languages.text: "Впрочем, ныне твой Патент в безопасности моего Музеона. Сам по себе он едва ли представляет для меня ценность, как и большинство ваших так называемых реликвий, однако как способ сравнять счет с династией воров, взявших в привычку переходить мне дорогу..." {n}Некрон негромко смеется.{/n} "Но, так и быть, я был бы рад избавиться от Патента, вернув его тебе, если бы не одна проблема: его место должен занять иной экспонат. Тот, который был у меня украден".

"Your Warrant is safe within my Museion, for now. It holds little value to me in itself, like most of your so-called relics. However, as a means to settle a score with a dynasty of thieves who have made a habit of crossing my path..." {n}The Necron lets out a low laugh.{/n} "But, very well. I would be glad to be rid of the Warrant and return it to you, were it not for one problem: its place must be taken by another exhibit. The one that was stolen from me."
languages.original_text: "Впрочем, ныне твой Патент в безопасности моего Музеона. Сам по себе он едва ли представляет для меня ценность, как и большинство ваших так называемых реликвий, однако как способ сравнять счет с династией воров, взявших в привычку переходить мне дорогу..." {n}Некрон негромко смеется.{/n} "Но, так и быть, я был бы рад избавиться от Патента, вернув его тебе, если бы не одна проблема: его место должен занять иной экспонат. Тот, который был у меня украден".

languages.text: “你的贸易授状眼下安全地存放在我的陈列馆里。这东西本身对我没什么价值，你们所谓的圣物大多也是如此。不过，倒是能借此跟一个总喜欢与我作对的窃贼王朝算算旧账……”{n}那太空死灵低声笑了起来。{/n}“不过，也罢。我其实很乐意把贸易授状还给你，只是有一个问题：它的空缺必须由另一件展品来补齐，就是你从我这儿偷走的那件展品。”
languages.original_text: "Your Warrant is safe within my Museion, for now. It holds little value to me in itself, like most of your so-called relics. However, as a means to settle a score with a dynasty of thieves who have made a habit of crossing my path..." {n}The Necron lets out a low laugh.{/n} "But, very well. I would be glad to be rid of the Warrant and return it to you, were it not for one problem: its place must be taken by another exhibit. The one that was stolen from me."

traits.locale_text: “你的贸易授状眼下安全地存放在我的陈列馆里。这东西本身对我没什么价值，你们所谓的圣物大多也是如此。不过，倒是能借此跟一个总喜欢与我作对的窃贼王朝算算旧账……”{n}那太空死灵低声笑了起来。{/n}“不过，也罢。我其实很乐意把贸易授状还给你，只是有一个问题：它的空缺必须由另一件展品来补齐，就是你从我这儿偷走的那件展品。”

languages.text: «Tu Patente está a salvo en mi Museion, por ahora. De por sí, no tiene mucho valor para mí, al igual que muchas de las cosas que llamáis reliquias. Sin embargo, como forma de ajustar cuentas con una dinastía de ladrones que tiene por costumbre entrometerse...». {n}El Necrón suelta una risa grave.{/n} «Pero de acuerdo, será un placer para mí devolverte la Patente y librarme de ella, pero hay un problema. Necesito una exposición que la sustituya. La que ya me has robado».
languages.original_text: "Your Warrant is safe within my Museion, for now. It holds little value to me in itself, like most of your so-called relics. However, as a means to settle a score with a dynasty of thieves who have made a habit of crossing my path..." {n}The Necron lets out a low laugh.{/n} "But, very well. I would be glad to be rid of the Warrant and return it to you, were it not for one problem: its place must be taken by another exhibit. The one that was stolen from me."

traits.locale_text: «Tu Patente está a salvo en mi Museion, por ahora. De por sí, no tiene mucho valor para mí, al igual que muchas de las cosas que llamáis reliquias. Sin embargo, como forma de ajustar cuentas con una dinastía de ladrones que tiene por costumbre entrometerse...». {n}El Necrón suelta una risa grave.{/n} «Pero de acuerdo, será un placer para mí devolverte la Patente y librarme de ella, pero hay un problema. Necesito una exposición que la sustituya. La que ya me has robado».

languages.text: « Pour le moment, votre lettre est à l'abri dans mon Muséion. Elle n'a que peu de valeur à mes yeux, à l'image de la plupart de vos prétendues reliques. Cependant, elle va me permettre de régler mes comptes avec une dynastie de voleurs qui a pris la fâcheuse habitude de se dresser en travers de mon chemin. » {n}Le Nécron laisse échapper un rire sourd.{/n} « Très bien. Je serai ravi de me débarrasser de la lettre et de vous la remettre, mais un problème demeure : une autre pièce d'exposition doit prendre sa place. Celle-là même qui m'a été dérobée. »
languages.original_text: "Your Warrant is safe within my Museion, for now. It holds little value to me in itself, like most of your so-called relics. However, as a means to settle a score with a dynasty of thieves who have made a habit of crossing my path..." {n}The Necron lets out a low laugh.{/n} "But, very well. I would be glad to be rid of the Warrant and return it to you, were it not for one problem: its place must be taken by another exhibit. The one that was stolen from me."

traits.locale_text: « Pour le moment, votre lettre est à l'abri dans mon Muséion. Elle n'a que peu de valeur à mes yeux, à l'image de la plupart de vos prétendues reliques. Cependant, elle va me permettre de régler mes comptes avec une dynastie de voleurs qui a pris la fâcheuse habitude de se dresser en travers de mon chemin. » {n}Le Nécron laisse échapper un rire sourd.{/n} « Très bien. Je serai ravi de me débarrasser de la lettre et de vous la remettre, mais un problème demeure : une autre pièce d'exposition doit prendre sa place. Celle-là même qui m'a été dérobée. »

languages.text: "Ruhsatname şimdilik Museion'umda güvende. Sözde yadigârlarının çoğu gibi kendi başına benim için pek bir değeri yok. Ancak yoluma çıkmayı alışkanlık hâline getirmiş bir hırsızın hanedanlığıyla hesabımı kapatmanın yolu olarak..." {n}Nekron hafifçe gülüyor.{/n} "Pekâlâ... Bir sorun olmasa Ruhsatname'den kurtulmaktan ve onu sana geri vermekten memnuniyet duyardım. Yerini başka bir sergi almalı. Benden çalınan sergi."
languages.original_text: "Your Warrant is safe within my Museion, for now. It holds little value to me in itself, like most of your so-called relics. However, as a means to settle a score with a dynasty of thieves who have made a habit of crossing my path..." {n}The Necron lets out a low laugh.{/n} "But, very well. I would be glad to be rid of the Warrant and return it to you, were it not for one problem: its place must be taken by another exhibit. The one that was stolen from me."

traits.locale_text: "Ruhsatname şimdilik Museion'umda güvende. Sözde yadigârlarının çoğu gibi kendi başına benim için pek bir değeri yok. Ancak yoluma çıkmayı alışkanlık hâline getirmiş bir hırsızın hanedanlığıyla hesabımı kapatmanın yolu olarak..." {n}Nekron hafifçe gülüyor.{/n} "Pekâlâ... Bir sorun olmasa Ruhsatname'den kurtulmaktan ve onu sana geri vermekten memnuniyet duyardım. Yerini başka bir sergi almalı. Benden çalınan sergi."

languages.text: "Fürs Erste ist dein Handelsbrief in meinem Museion sicher. Er selbst hat für mich nur einen geringen Wert, wie die meisten eurer sogenannten Relikte. Als Mittel, mit einer Dynastie von Dieben eine Rechnung zu begleichen, die es sich nur Gewohnheit gemacht hat, meinen Weg zu kreuzen hingegen ..." {n}Der Necron stößt ein tiefes Lachen aus.{/n} "Aber gut. Ich würde dir den Handelsbrief ja mit Freude zurückgeben, wenn es da nicht ein Problem gäbe: Er muss durch ein anderes Exponat ersetzt werden. Dem Exponat, das mir gestohlen wurde."
languages.original_text: "Your Warrant is safe within my Museion, for now. It holds little value to me in itself, like most of your so-called relics. However, as a means to settle a score with a dynasty of thieves who have made a habit of crossing my path..." {n}The Necron lets out a low laugh.{/n} "But, very well. I would be glad to be rid of the Warrant and return it to you, were it not for one problem: its place must be taken by another exhibit. The one that was stolen from me."

Als Mittel, mit einer Dynastie von Dieben eine Rechnung zu begleichen, die es sich nur Gewohnheit gemacht hat, meinen Weg zu kreuzen hingegen ..." {n}Der Necron stößt ein tiefes Lachen aus.{/n} "Aber gut. Ich würde dir den Handelsbrief ja mit Freude zurückgeben, wenn es da nicht ein Problem gäbe: Er muss durch ein anderes Exponat ersetzt werden. Dem Exponat, das mir gestohlen wurde."

languages.text: 「あなたの証は、私のミュージオンの中に安全に保管されています。今は、ほとんどのあなたの所謂遺物と同じように、私にとって価値は低いですが、盗賊の王朝と決着をつける手段としてなら…{n}ネクロノスは低い笑い声を漏らす.{/n}「しかし、いいでしょう。証を返して、あなたに渡すことにしましょう。ただ、一つ問題があります。その代わりに、別の展示品を置く必要があるのです。私が盗まれたもの。」
languages.original_text: "Your Warrant is safe within my Museion, for now. It holds little value to me in itself, like most of your so-called relics. However, as a means to settle a score with a dynasty of thieves who have made a habit of crossing my path..." {n}The Necron lets out a low laugh.{/n} "But, very well. I would be glad to be rid of the Warrant and return it to you, were it not for one problem: its place must be taken by another exhibit. The one that was stolen from me."
